task_description: Make all modules natively Turbopack-compatible by eliminating turbopack ignoreIssue config and turbopackIgnore comments. The fix externalizes the getDataDir() module and tunnel system into workspace packages added to serverExternalPackages.

verification.summary: Build produces 0 NFT warnings (previously 81). Typecheck passes. Zero turbopackIgnore or ignoreIssue anywhere in the project.
